latin: Magus senex in ponte stabat et monstro igneo viam obstruxit. 'tu non transibis!' clamavit, baculum in pontem percutiens. pons fractus est et ambo in abyssum ceciderunt.

questions.prompt: What does the wizard do to protect his friends?
questions.target: Blocks the bridge and confronts the fiery monster
choices: Blocks the bridge and confronts the fiery monster

questions.target: It breaks and both fall into the abyss
choices: It breaks and both fall into the abyss

translation: An old wizard stood on a bridge and blocked the path of a fiery monster. 'You shall not pass!' he shouted, striking the bridge with his staff. The bridge broke and both fell into the abyss.
